trade.summary: Growing bilateral trade. Brasile is Turchia's largest supplier of soybeans and soybean meal — critical for Turchia's livestock sector. Brasile also exports iron ore, beef, and coffee. Turchia exports machinery, vehicles, and textiles to Brasile.

diplomatic.summary: Both countries pursue active non-alignment policies and have attempted to play mediating roles in international conflicts. Brasile and Turchia cooperated on the Iran nuclear diplomacy (2010 joint declaration). Both are G20 members with significant regional weight.

military.summary: No formal military alliance. Some defense industry contacts. Turchia's drone technology (Bayraktar) has attracted Brasileian military interest. Limited defense cooperation.

financial.summary: Limited bilateral investment. Some Turkish construction companies have Brasileian market presence. Growing commercial ties in agribusiness.

energy.summary: Limited energy trade. Turchia imports some Brasileian ethanol. Brasile has exported hydropower technology and expertise to Turchia.

scientific.summary: Growing but limited scientific cooperation. Some academic exchanges in social sciences, engineering, and agricultural research.
